notes: The TF5 is a 32-fader (32+1) digital mixing console. Rack-unit figure of 6U is approximate — the unit is not a standard rack-mount console but can be rack-mounted with optional accessories; physical dimensions are 866×225×599mm (WxHxD). The IEC inlet type (C13 vs C14) is inferred from standard practice for this class of console as the spec sheets do not explicitly name the inlet standard — only 'power cord included' is mentioned. Three USB ports total: USB-B (TO HOST, rear), USB-A (TO DEVICE, rear), USB-A (TO DEVICE, top panel). Network grade is eth-100m (100BASE-TX confirmed in specs). The expansion slot accommodates optional cards (e.g., NY64-D for Dante) but has no exposed connector in default configuration and is not listed as a port. Footswitch jack is TS (mono) per FC5 compatibility. Confidence is medium because the power connector type and the precise USB-B vs USB-A designation come from secondary/FAQ sources rather than the primary spec sheet directly.

ports.name: INPUT 1–32
ports.note: 32 mic/line combo jacks (XLR-3-31 female + TRS 6.35mm), with 48V phantom power and recallable D-PRE preamps

ports.name: ST IN 1
ports.note: Stereo unbalanced line input pair (L/R RCA)

ports.name: ST IN 2
ports.note: Stereo unbalanced line input pair (L/R RCA)

ports.name: PHONES
ports.note: Stereo headphone output, TRS 6.35mm phone jack

ports.name: USB TO HOST
ports.note: USB Type-B, rear panel; 34ch x 34ch audio interface to host computer at 48 kHz / 24-bit

ports.name: USB TO DEVICE (rear)
ports.note: USB Type-A, rear panel; for USB storage device recording/playback (2ch) and firmware updates

ports.name: USB TO DEVICE (top)
ports.note: USB Type-A, top panel; for iPad connection or additional USB storage

ports.name: NETWORK
ports.note: IEEE 802.3 10BASE-T/100BASE-TX; used for TF StageMix iPad control app and network control

ports.name: FOOT SW
ports.note: TS 6.35mm phone jack for optional FC5 footswitch

ports.name: AC IN
ports.note: IEC C14 inlet; 100–240V 50/60Hz, 120W; power cord included
